parameters.query:
INSERT INTO appointments (psychologist_id, patient_id, scheduled_at, duration_minutes, appointment_type, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, $3::timestamptz, $4::integer, $5, 'scheduled', NOW(), NOW())
RETURNING id, scheduled_at, appointment_type

parameters.subject: 📅 Tu cita ha sido programada
